title: hydrocotyle glochidiata
intro: Hydrocotyle glochidiata, also known as Indian pennywort or gotu kola, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical regions. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Hydrocotyle glochidiata is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tablet, and can also be used topically in the form of a cream or oil.
